content.query:
-- ********************************************************************************** --
-- parameter: [customer].[ext_inc_claims_1000006_20240229_20240701_ELS_Cohort_Geo%_t] --
-- ********************************************************************************** --
-- select count(*) from [customer].[stg_hg_incr_claims_t] c
-- where 
--     c.patient_age = '7';
--	972,989,544
-- select count(*) from [appl].[hg_deid_claims_t];
-- 327492698
-- 293869750
-- 351627096

delete from appl.hg_deid_claims_t;

-- 1. find patient age by token and dos_begin year from the incremental claims data
delete from appl.hg_claims_age_by_year_t;
insert into appl.hg_claims_age_by_year_t
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
SELECT distinct 
    a.token
    , try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year
    , try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
from
    [customer].[stg_hg_incr_claims_t] a 
where 
    try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) is not null
    and a.DOS_BEGIN is not null
    and substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) <> ''
    and a.patient_age is not null
    and a.patient_age <> ''
    and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
;
go


-- 2. find the corrected age by token and dos_begin year
delete from appl.hg_claims_corrected_age_t;
insert into  appl.hg_claims_corrected_age_t
(
	token
  , dos_year
  , min_patient_age
  , diff_patient_age
  , cnt_patient_age
) 
select token, dos_year
  , min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as min_patient_age
  , max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as diff_patient_age
  , count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as cnt_patient_age
from 
    appl.hg_claims_age_by_year_t
group by 
    token, dos_year
having count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 2 
  and max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 1
;



-- ********* below steps loop through three hg_deid_claims1_t, hg_deid_claims2_t, hg_deid_claims3_t ********* --

-- 3. redact age, gender, zip3
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_hg_incr_claims_patient_age ON [customer].[stg_hg_incr_claims_t] (PATIENT_GENDER);

CREATE STATISTICS Stats_hg_incr_claims_patient_age ON [customer].[stg_hg_incr_claims_t] (PATIENT_GENDER);

delete from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t];
insert into [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t]
(
    [TOKEN]
    ,[CLAIM_NUM]
    ,[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
    ,[CLAIM_TYPE]
    ,[DOS_BEGIN]
    ,[DOS_END]
    ,[PRACT_NPI]
    ,[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
    ,[PATIENT_GENDER]
    ,[PATIENT_AGE]
    ,[PATIENT_ZIP_3]
    ,[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
    ,[PROCEDURE_CODE]
    ,[PROC_MD_1]
    ,[PROC_MD_2]
    ,[PROC_MD_3]
    ,[PROC_MD_4] 
    ,[DIAG_CD1]
    ,[DIAG_CD2]
    ,[DIAG_CD3]
    ,[DIAG_CD4]
    ,[DIAG_CD5]
    ,[DIAG_CD6]
    ,[DIAG_CD7]
    ,[DIAG_CD8]
    ,[DIAG_CD9]
    ,[DIAG_CD10]
    ,[DIAG_CD11]
    ,[DIAG_CD12]
    ,[DIAG_CD13]
    ,[DIAG_CD14]
    ,[DIAG_CD15]
    ,[DIAG_CD16]
    ,[DIAG_CD17]
    ,[DIAG_CD18]
    ,[DIAG_CD19]
    ,[DIAG_CD20]
    ,[ICD_VERSION]
    ,[DRG_CODE]
    ,[NDC_CD]
    ,[SETTING_OF_CARE]
    ,[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
    ,[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
    ,[835_FLAG]
    ,[CHARGE_AMT]
    ,[PAID_AMT]
    ,[ALLOWED_AMT]
    ,[PATIENT_RESP]
)
select 
    c.[TOKEN]
    , c.[CLAIM_NUM]
    , c.[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
    , c.[CLAIM_TYPE]
    , c.[DOS_BEGIN]
    , c.[DOS_END]
    , c.[PRACT_NPI]
    , c.[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
    -- redact gender
    , case when c.[PATIENT_GENDER] is null or c.[PATIENT_GENDER] = '' then 'U' else c.[PATIENT_GENDER] end AS [PATIENT_GENDER]
    -- redact age
    , coalesce(b.age_lvl2, '') AS [PATIENT_AGE]
    -- redact zip3
    , case when z2.zip3 is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '000' or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '' then '000' 
    else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) 
    end AS [PATIENT_ZIP_3]
    , c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
    , c.[PROCEDURE_CODE]
    , c.[PROC_MD_1]
    , c.[PROC_MD_2]
    , c.[PROC_MD_3]
    , c.[PROC_MD_4]
    , c.[DIAG_CD1]
    , c.[DIAG_CD2]
    , c.[DIAG_CD3]
    , c.[DIAG_CD4]
    , c.[DIAG_CD5]
    , c.[DIAG_CD6]
    , c.[DIAG_CD7]
    , c.[DIAG_CD8]
    , c.[DIAG_CD9]
    , c.[DIAG_CD10]
    , c.[DIAG_CD11]
    , c.[DIAG_CD12]
    , c.[DIAG_CD13]
    , c.[DIAG_CD14]
    , c.[DIAG_CD15]
    , c.[DIAG_CD16]
    , c.[DIAG_CD17]
    , c.[DIAG_CD18]
    , c.[DIAG_CD19]
    , c.[DIAG_CD20]
    , c.[ICD_VERSION]
    , c.[DRG_CODE]
    , c.[NDC_CD]
    , c.[SETTING_OF_CARE]
    , c.[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
    , c.[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
    , c.[835_FLAG]
    , c.[CHARGE_AMT]
    , c.[PAID_AMT]
    , c.[ALLOWED_AMT]
    , c.[PATIENT_RESP]
from 
    [customer].[stg_hg_incr_claims_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) = z2.zip3
    -- correct age for patients with multiple ages in a year
    left join [appl].[hg_claims_corrected_age_t] a
        on c.[token] = a.[token] 
        and try_cast(substring(c.[DOS_BEGIN], 1, 4) as integer) = a.[dos_year]
    -- age buckets
    left join [dim].[age_ranges_t] b
        on coalesce(a.min_patient_age, cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer)) between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
where 
    c.patient_age <= '54' -- hg_deid_claims1_t
    -- c.patient_age > '54' and c.patient_age < '70' -- hg_deid_claims2_t
    -- c.patient_age >= '70' -- hg_deid_claims3_t
;
GO


-- 4. redact procedure code
-- CREATE STATISTICS deid_claims_1_procedure_code ON [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t]([PROCEDURE_CODE]);
update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.suppression 
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] h
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'HCPCS';
GO

update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.suppression
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD' + icdp.icd_version 
        and icdp.type = 'Procedure';
GO


-- 5. redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[PROC_MD_1] = null
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_1] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_2] = null
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_2] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_3] = null
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_3] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_4] = null
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_4] = h.code
GO


-- 6. redact DRG code
update c
set c.[DRG_CODE] = null
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
    on c.[DRG_CODE] = drg.code 
GO


-- 7. redact setting_of_care
update c
set c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.suppression
from [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] c
    inner join
    (
        select 'P' as claims_type, code, suppression from [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t]
        union
        select distinct 'I' as claims_type, substring(code, 1, 3) as code, null as suppression from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) a
    on c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = a.claims_type
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.code
;


-- 8. redact diagnosis code
update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and ((try_cast(substring([DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [DIAG_CD1] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
    or [DIAG_CD1] like 'V3%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'E910%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'E913%' or substring([DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;
GO

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = 'V8541'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and [DIAG_CD1] in ('V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;
GO

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and ([DIAG_CD1] like 'P%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'V%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'S06%7A' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'S06%8A'  or [DIAG_CD1] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = 'Z6841'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and [DIAG_CD1] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO

------
update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD2] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and ((try_cast(substring([DIAG_CD2], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [DIAG_CD2] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
    or [DIAG_CD2] like 'V3%' or [DIAG_CD2] like 'E910%' or [DIAG_CD2] like 'E913%' or substring([DIAG_CD2], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;

set [DIAG_CD2] = 'V8541'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and [DIAG_CD2] in ('V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;
GO

set [DIAG_CD2] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and ([DIAG_CD2] like 'P%' or [DIAG_CD2] like 'V%' or [DIAG_CD2] like 'S06%7A' or [DIAG_CD2] like 'S06%8A'  or [DIAG_CD2] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([DIAG_CD2], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD2] = 'Z6841'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and [DIAG_CD2] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;

    or [DIAG_CD3] like 'V3%' or [DIAG_CD3] like 'E910%' or [DIAG_CD3] like 'E913%' or substring([DIAG_CD3], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))

    or substring([DIAG_CD3], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;

    or substring([DIAG_CD4], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))

    and ((try_cast(substring([DIAG_CD7], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [DIAG_CD7] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280')

;

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t]

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD19] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and ((try_cast(substring([DIAG_CD19], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [DIAG_CD19] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
    or [DIAG_CD19] like 'V3%' or [DIAG_CD19] like 'E910%' or [DIAG_CD19] like 'E913%' or substring([DIAG_CD19], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;
GO

update [appl].[hg_deid_claims1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD19] = 'V8541'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and [DIAG_CD19] in ('V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;
GO

    and ([DIAG_CD19] like 'P%' or [DIAG_CD19] like 'V%' or [DIAG_CD19] like 'S06%7A' or [DIAG_CD19] like 'S06%8A'  or [DIAG_CD19] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([DIAG_CD19], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
